About Organization

The Madhya Pradesh High Court is the highest court in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It has a sanctioned strength of 53 judges, including the Chief Justice of Madhya Pradesh.

The Madhya Pradesh High Court was established in 1956 under the States Reorganisation Act. The court has its principal seat in Jabalpur and a permanent bench in Indore.

About the Programme

The MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates who have a BE / B.Tech Degree in CS / IT / Electronics and Telecommunication / BCA / MCA / M.SC Electronics / CS / IT Trade with Experience.

The objective of the MP High Court Senior Computer Programmer Assistant Recruitment 2026 is to recruit 130 Senior Computer Programmer Assistants to work with the Madhya Pradesh High Court.
